CONTENT.Career: Rouault joined the youth academy of Toulouse in 2016. He made his professional debut with Toulouse in a 1–0 Ligue 2 win over Ajaccio on 17 October 2020.On 1 September 2023, Rouault was loaned out to VfB Stuttgart until the end of the season. When Stuttgart's place in the 2024–25 Bundesliga was mathematically confirmed in March 2024, Rouault joined the German club automatically in a permanent deal with a contract until June 2027.
CONTENT.Honours: ToulouseCoupe de France: 2022–23Ligue 2: 2021–22IndividualUNFP Ligue 2 Team of the Year: 2021–22

SUMMARY: Anthony Rouault (born 29 May 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart.
